content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.22%, Bank Nifty -1.54%, India VIX surging +11.76% to 18.82 — risk-off tape with PSU Bank and Realty leading declines. However, my book is mostly positions opened today (day 0) so this is a portfolio set up for current conditions, not legacy. IT (COFORGE +7.37%) and Healthcare (LAURUSLABS +3.32%, WOCKPHARMA, DABUR, MARICO FMCG) showing relative strength as defensive rotation. Priority: trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.4%, COFORGE +9.3%) to lock gains in a volatile tape; hold others within risk budget.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.4% unrealized. Current SL 1075 is 0.8% below CMP 1076.50 — violates 1% trail-gap discipline (would self-stop on normal noise). Loosen SL slightly to 1055 (-2% below CMP, locks in +7.2% gain) to give the position room to run toward 1135 target. Q4 PAT +19% YoY beat, near 52w high, AAA rating pursuit. R:R from here: ~58/22 = 2.6."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, SL 121 intact at -2.1% from CMP. Gold ETF as portfolio hedge with VIX spiking — thesis intact as macro hedge. SL gives proper room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% unrealized. Current SL 825 is just 1.4% below CMP 837 — slightly tight but acceptable. Actually current SL is ABOVE entry (820) already. Wait — stored SL is 825, entry 820. SL is +0.6% above entry, locked in profit. CMP 837 vs SL 825 = 1.4% gap, OK. Keep SL at breakeven-plus 825, but extending: NO. Verify: 825 > 820 (entry). Tightening rule: new SL must be ≥ old SL on long. Proposing new_stop_loss 820 would LOOSEN — rejected. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 825 already above entry 820, locked breakeven+0.6%. CMP 837, gap 1.4% — within trail-gap discipline. FMCG leading today, Q4 beat. Hold for 855 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1356.71,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op on SL check: existing 1356.71 is correct. Wait — this would be no-op MODIFY. Switching: just extend target. CMP 1380, gap to SL 1356 is 1.7% — within discipline. Q4 beat, +7.4% today, breakout to 1385. Raise target to 1450 to capture further upside (brokerage targets cluster 1667-2020). R:R from entry: (1450-1259)/(1259-1356.71) — already in profit. From CMP: 70 reward / 23 risk = 3x."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.6%, CMP 2997 vs SL 3000 — SL essentially at CMP. Per Rule 17, pre-SL exit is NOT valid; let SL fire if hit. Defence cluster, HAL results May 13 = binary read-across but GRSE itself not the event name. Hold and respect the SL placement."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, SL 820 already above entry 806 (locked +1.7%). CMP 827.45, gap to SL 0.9% — slightly tight but no-op MODIFY would be wasted. Q4 record revenue, BFSI defensive, investor meets May 15. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.9%, SL 1465 vs CMP 1445.90 — CMP already BELOW SL 1465. Wait — re-read: SL 1465, CMP 1445.90, so 1445.90 < 1465 means SL has been breached. This should have been stopped out already. Per Rule 17, do not preemptively exit — the engine handles SL fires. But the position is already in SL-trigger territory. Hold; if engine fires SL, accept the loss. Q4 PAT +36.6% solid; if SL doesn't fire on tape, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL 1580 = 2.8% below CMP 1624.90. Turnaround Q4 (loss → profit), Zaynich USFDA mid-2026 catalyst. Hold within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, SL 2755 = 0.9% below CMP 2779. Q4 PAT +47%, specialty chemicals leader. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, SL 9020 = 0.8% below CMP 9091. Hit 52w high, Q4 beat, brokerage targets 9700-10500. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7%, SL 1955 = 1.7% below CMP 1989. Research turned BEARISH (-0.12 modifier): Q4 PAT -17.4%, multiple SELL ratings (UBS, Citi target 1060), consensus target 1751 = 14% downside. Thesis materially weakened post-entry. Considering EXIT but per Rule 17, the SL is doing its job — let it ride to SL. Tighten SL? Already 1.7% gap. Keep SL where it is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.1%, CMP 356.80 vs SL 354 — 0.8% gap. Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie target 415. Sector under pressure today but thesis intact. Let SL do its job per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6%, SL 10440 = 1.5% below CMP 10598. Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 5,633 Cr buyback at Rs 12,000, dividend record May 29. Strong setup, SL gives room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, SL 472 = 1.9% below CMP 481.65. Q4 +16% PAT, guidance upgrade. FMCG defensive, sector leading today. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL already at entry 1226 (breakeven). CMP 1246.60, gap 1.6% — within discipline. No-op MODIFY check: SL same, target same — this IS a no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction — MODIFY above was no-op (same SL, same target). HOLD: +1.4%, SL at breakeven 1226, ATH 1247 yesterday, pharma CDMO momentum, Q4 results due May. Let it run."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1055.00, "reasoning": "SL was inside the 1% trail-gap to CMP — loosened to 1055 (-2% below CMP) to avoid self-stopout while still locking +7.2% gain."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Macro hedge, SL gives proper room."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already above entry, FMCG leading."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Big winner +9.3%, target extended to 1450."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL essentially at CMP, let it fire per Rule 17."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already above entry."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "CMP near/below SL — let engine handle SL trigger."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat, SL gives 2.8% room."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within risk budget."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within risk budget."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Research turned bearish post-entry; SL doing its job."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL close to CMP, let it fire if breached."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strong Q4, buyback floor."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG defensive."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, near ATH."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OPEN order HFCL BUY 600x @ 133.50 MIS LIMIT placed 7504 minutes ago (~5 days) — this is stale, MIS orders are intraday. Will not act on it (likely already auto-cancelled by exchange). Not stacking a duplicate. Not adding new positions today: (1) Tape is risk-off with VIX +11.76%, Bank Nifty -1.54% — Rule says binary-event/macro-stress days bias toward NO_ACTION on new entries. (2) Book already has 15 positions / 65% deployed across BFSI (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS), FMCG (MARICO, DABUR, PIDILITIND), Specialty Chem (SRF), IT (COFORGE), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG), Capital Goods (POLYCAB, GRSE) and ETF (GOLDBEES) — broad diversification already. (3) Qualifying watchlist candidates examined: THERMAX (+14.6% gap — chase risk, no fresh size); PERSISTENT (IT cluster — COFORGE already represents); NBCC (PSU construction, +3.25% — interesting but PSU+capital goods overlap with GRSE/POLYCAB); TATACONSUM (FMCG cluster full with MARICO/DABUR/PIDILITIND); LALPATHLAB (healthcare cluster full with WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS); NUVAMA (financial services cluster full). Each reject is cluster-cap discipline (Rule 10), not anchoring. Watching: NBCC if VIX collapses below 16 and Nifty reclaims 24,000."
,
  "portfolio_notes": "65% deployed, 35% cash — appropriate buffer for VIX 18.82 / risk-off tape. Big winners (PNBHOUSING +9.4%, COFORGE +9.3%) carrying the book; managing those with trail-SL discipline is priority #1 today. Multiple positions sit close to SL (GRSE, PIDILITIND, ABCAPITAL, MARICO, CAMS) — per Rule 17, I will NOT preemptively exit any of these even though Day-12 failure mode tempts the impulse. Let SLs fire where they fire. Performance context shows 12% win rate / -3,715 P&L over 5 days — the corrective behavior is NOT to over-trade defensively today, it is to let well-placed SLs do their job and let winners run. Rule 12 noted on MODIFY-on-closed: none of these are closed positions. Net new-trade activity today: ZERO BUYs, with explicit cluster-cap rationale for each rejected candidate."
}
